class Box[T]:

    def __init__(self, v: T):
        self.value = v

    def get(self) -> T:
        return self.value

print(int_box.get())

str_box = Box[str]("hello")
print(str_box.get())

# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
# 42
# hello
